title: Best practices for training large language models on limited hardware
content: I am working on my thesis and only have access to a single RTX 3090. What are some effective strategies to fine-tune a 7B model? Should I look into LoRA or QLoRA?

comments.content: QLoRA is highly recommended for your setup. It allows 4-bit quantization, which fits perfectly within 24GB VRAM.
I successfully used Unsloth for this! It speeds up fine-tuning massively and reduces memory footprint.

title: Quantum entanglement in macroscopic systems
content: Is there any recent empirical evidence showing entanglement maintained at a macroscopic level? The literature from 2024 suggested some breakthroughs in supercooled states.
